sourceAmbiguity: Sibling phase 2 frontend tasks 199, 200, and 201 may not have published coherent local outputs when par_196 is implemented.
decisionTaken: Publish the smallest compatible `/portal/*` seam using task 185 projection vocabulary, with separate route paths for home, requests, detail, audience narrowing, reachability blocker, and session recovery.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The seam consumes PatientHomeProjection, PatientRequestsIndexProjection, PatientRequestDetailProjection, PatientAudienceCoverageProjection, PatientIdentityHoldProjection, PatientActionRecoveryProjection, and PatientRequestReturnBundle without assuming sibling-specific internals.
operationalRisk: Future sibling work may choose different route aliases or finer projection fields.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Map sibling route aliases to the same PatientPortalEntryProjection resolver and keep selected-anchor recovery behavior unchanged.
